description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped stone with a rugged, pitted surface and a mix of dark brown, gray, and off-white coloration. The stone features numerous cavities and protrusions, giving it a weathered and natural appearance. One side is notably lighter, with creamy white and pinkish mineral inclusions, while the other sides are darker and more metallic in sheen. The surface texture is coarse, with visible mineral grains and rough, jagged edges. There are no artificial markings or signs of human modification, and the stone appears solid and dense. Its overall form suggests it could serve as a natural obstacle or decorative element in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A rugged, irregular stone with dark brown, gray, and off-white hues, featuring pitted surfaces and mineral inclusions. Its coarse texture and natural weathering make it visually striking.
description_view_0: This view highlights the dark, metallic brown surface with deep pits and rough, uneven texture.
description_view_1: This angle shows a more silvery-gray face with pronounced cavities and a slightly reflective sheen.
description_view_2: The stone's lightest side is visible here, dominated by off-white and pinkish mineral inclusions and a blockier structure.
description_view_3: This view presents a mix of dark brown and gray surfaces with several deep holes and jagged edges.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on soil or gravel
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling with mineral inclusions and pitted cavities; no regular or artificial patterns.
attribute_weathering: Rough and pitted with visible signs of natural erosion and mineral exposure.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with manicured lawns or paved surfaces, but can blend with other natural stones or planted areas.

license_info.creator_display_name: C. Geología de Yacimientos Minerales - FCNyM-UNLP
